sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click the blue blob to invert the board
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 36}])
print("Action result:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print(f"\nStep: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")

# Check yellow objects
print("\nYellow objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: px={n['pixels']}, bounds=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check gray area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nGray area (row 40-47):")
for r in range(40, 48):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][23:45]}")

# Check if any new objects appeared
print("\nAll non-background objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'W']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, bounds=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
